source.project: Drievu Limited — Security & Smart Building Systems
source.note: This file previously contained tokens scraped from an unrelated site (navbardigital.com) and did not reflect this project's actual brand. Corrected to mirror src/app/globals.css, the single source of truth.

palette.name: brand-teal-deep
palette.use: Hover/pressed state for primary teal CTAs and icon badges

palette.name: brand-green
palette.use: ESG telemetry, glowing indicator dots — never body text (fails AA on white)

palette.name: brand-grey-light
palette.use: Secondary/muted text on dark (brand-slate) surfaces only

palette.name: brand-mist
palette.use: Light background tints, table rows, section bands

palette.name: brand-dark
palette.use: Deepest background shade behind directional scrims

typography.note: Weights above 500 are banned project-wide; hierarchy is achieved via optical scale and tracking, not weight.

spacing.note: Standard Tailwind spacing scale — this project does not use a custom fractional scale.
